1: use anyhow::{Result, bail};

3: use crate::cmd::rebase_conflict;
4: use crate::error::EzError;
5: use crate::git;

10: struct MergeTarget {
11:     branch: String,
12:     pr_number: u64,
13:     title: String,
14: }
15: 
16: struct MergeOutcome {
17:     branch: String,
18:     pr_number: u64,
19:     restacked: usize,
20: }
21: 
22: fn merge_targets(state: &StackState, current: &str, stack: bool) -> Result<Vec<MergeTarget>> {
23:     let branches = if stack {
24:         state.linear_stack(current)?
25:     } else {
26:         vec![state.stack_bottom(current)]
27:     };
28: 
29:     branches
30:         .into_iter()
31:         .map(|branch| {
32:             let meta = state.get_branch(&branch)?;
33:             let pr_number = match meta.pr_number {
34:                 Some(number) => number,
35:                 None => bail!(EzError::UserMessage(format!(
36:                     "Branch `{branch}` has no associated PR — run `ez submit` first"
37:                 ))),
38:             };
39:             let effective_repo = state.effective_pr_repo(&branch);
40:             let title = github::get_pr_status_in_repo(&branch, effective_repo.as_deref())?
41:                 .map(|pr| pr.title)
42:                 .unwrap_or_else(|| "(unknown)".to_string());
43:             Ok(MergeTarget {
44:                 branch,
45:                 pr_number,
46:                 title,
47:             })
48:         })
49:         .collect()
50: }
51: 
52: fn merge_branch(
53:     state: &mut StackState,
54:     branch: &str,
55:     pr_number: u64,
56:     method: &str,
57: ) -> Result<MergeOutcome> {
58:     let trunk = state.trunk.clone();
59:     let remote = state.remote.clone();
60:     let effective_repo = state.effective_pr_repo(branch);
61: 
62:     let sp = ui::spinner(&format!("Merging PR #{pr_number}..."));
63:     github::merge_pr_in_repo(pr_number, method, effective_repo.as_deref())?;
64:     sp.finish_and_clear();
65:     ui::info(&format!("Merged PR #{pr_number} for `{branch}`"));
66: 
67:     let children = state.reparent_children_preserving_parent_head(branch, &trunk)?;
68:     for child_name in &children {
69:         ui::info(&format!("Reparented `{child_name}` onto `{trunk}`"));
70: 
71:         let child_repo = state.effective_pr_repo(child_name);
72:         if let Some(child_pr) = state.get_branch(child_name)?.pr_number
73:             && let Err(e) = github::update_pr_base_in_repo(child_pr, &trunk, child_repo.as_deref())
74:         {
75:             ui::warn(&format!("Failed to update PR base for `{child_name}`: {e}"));
76:         }
77:     }
78: 
79:     state.remove_branch(branch);
80: 
81:     if git::branch_exists(branch) {
82:         if git::current_branch()? == branch {
83:             git::checkout(&trunk)?;
84:         }
85:         let _ = git::delete_branch(branch, true);
86:     }
87: 
88:     // Best-effort remote cleanup to preserve prior `gh pr merge --delete-branch`
89:     // behavior while using the non-interactive REST merge path.
90:     let _ = git::delete_remote_branch(&remote, branch);
91: 
92:     let sp = ui::spinner("Fetching latest changes...");
93:     git::fetch(&remote)?;
94:     sp.finish_and_clear();
95: 
96:     let order = state.topo_order();
97:     let current_root = git::repo_root()?;
98:     let mut restacked = 0;
99: 
100:     for branch_name in &order {
101:         let meta = state.get_branch(branch_name)?;
102:         let parent = meta.parent.clone();
103:         let stored_parent_head = meta.parent_head.clone();
104: 
105:         let current_parent_tip = if state.is_trunk(&parent) {
106:             git::rev_parse(&format!("{remote}/{parent}"))?
107:         } else {
108:             git::rev_parse(&parent)?
109:         };
110: 
111:         if current_parent_tip == stored_parent_head {
112:             continue;
113:         }
114: 
115:         if let Ok(Some(_wt_path)) = git::branch_checked_out_elsewhere(branch_name, &current_root) {
116:             ui::warn(&format!("Skipped `{branch_name}` (in worktree)"));
117:             continue;
118:         }
119: 
120:         let sp = ui::spinner(&format!("Restacking `{branch_name}` onto `{parent}`..."));
121:         let outcome = git::rebase_onto(&current_parent_tip, &stored_parent_head, branch_name)?;
122:         sp.finish_and_clear();
123: 
124:         match outcome {
125:             git::RebaseOutcome::RebasingComplete => {
126:                 let meta = state.get_branch_mut(branch_name)?;
127:                 meta.parent_head = current_parent_tip;
128:                 restacked += 1;
129:                 ui::info(&format!("Restacked `{branch_name}` onto `{parent}`"));
130:             }
131:             git::RebaseOutcome::Conflict(conflict) => {
132:                 state.save()?;
133:                 rebase_conflict::report("merge", branch_name, &parent, &conflict, "ez restack");
134:                 bail!(EzError::RebaseConflict(branch_name.clone()));
135:             }
136:         }
137:     }
138: 
139:     state.save()?;
140: 
141:     Ok(MergeOutcome {
142:         branch: branch.to_string(),
143:         pr_number,
144:         restacked,
145:     })
146: }

148: pub fn run(method: &str, yes: bool, stack: bool, local: bool, strategy: &str, into: Option<&str>, force: bool) -> Result<()> {
149:     if local {
150:         return run_local(strategy, into, force);
151:     }
152: 
153:     let mut state = StackState::load()?;
154:     if let Some(root) = git::current_linked_worktree_root()? {
155:         ui::linked_worktree_warning(&root);
156:     }
157:     let current = git::current_branch()?;
158: 
159:     if state.is_trunk(&current) {
160:         bail!(EzError::OnTrunk);
161:     }
162: 
163:     if !state.is_managed(&current) {
164:         bail!(EzError::BranchNotInStack(current.clone()));
165:     }
166: 
167:     let targets = merge_targets(&state, &current, stack)?;
168:     if targets.is_empty() {
169:         ui::info("No PRs to merge.");
170:         return Ok(());
171:     }
172: 
173:     if !yes {
174:         let confirmed = if stack {
175:             let summary = targets
176:                 .iter()
177:                 .map(|target| format!("#{} `{}`", target.pr_number, target.branch))
178:                 .collect::<Vec<_>>()
179:                 .join(", ");
180:             ui::confirm(&format!(
181:                 "Merge {} PRs from the current stack ({summary})?",
182:                 targets.len()
183:             ))
184:         } else {
185:             let target = &targets[0];
186:             ui::confirm(&format!(
187:                 "Merge PR #{} for `{}` ({})?",
188:                 target.pr_number, target.branch, target.title
189:             ))
190:         };
191: 
192:         if !confirmed {
193:             ui::info("Aborted");
194:             return Ok(());
195:         }
196:     }
197: 
198:     let mut total_restacked = 0;
199: 
200:     for target in &targets {
201:         let outcome = merge_branch(&mut state, &target.branch, target.pr_number, method)?;
202:         total_restacked += outcome.restacked;
203:         ui::receipt(&serde_json::json!({
204:             "cmd": "merge",
205:             "branch": outcome.branch,
206:             "pr_number": outcome.pr_number,
207:             "method": method,
208:             "stack": stack,
209:         }));
210:     }
211: 
212:     if total_restacked > 0 {
213:         ui::info(&format!("Restacked {total_restacked} branch(es)"));
214:     }
215: 
216:     if stack {
217:         ui::success(&format!(
218:             "Merged {} PR(s) from the current stack",
219:             targets.len()
220:         ));
221:     } else {
222:         ui::success("Merge complete");
223:     }
224: 
225:     Ok(())
226: }
227: 
228: fn run_local(strategy: &str, into: Option<&str>, force: bool) -> Result<()> {
229:     let mut state = StackState::load()?;
230:     if let Some(root) = git::current_linked_worktree_root()? {
231:         ui::linked_worktree_warning(&root);
232:     }
233:     let current = git::current_branch()?;
234: 
235:     if state.is_trunk(&current) {
236:         bail!(EzError::OnTrunk);
237:     }
238:     if !state.is_managed(&current) {
239:         bail!(EzError::BranchNotInStack(current.clone()));
240:     }
241: 
242:     let target = into
243:         .map(|s| s.to_string())
244:         .unwrap_or_else(|| {
245:             state
246:                 .get_branch(&current)
247:                 .map(|m| m.parent.clone())
248:                 .unwrap_or_else(|_| "main".to_string())
249:         });
250: 
251:     let current_root = git::repo_root()?;
252: 
253:     match strategy {
254:         "squash" => {
255:             git::checkout(&target)?;
256:             git::merge_squash(&current)?;
257:             let msg = format!("squash: {current}");
258:             git::commit(&msg)?;
259:             ui::success(&format!("Squashed `{current}` into `{target}`"));
260:         }
261:         "rebase" => {
262:             let success = git::rebase(&target, &current)?;
263:             if !success {
264:                 bail!(EzError::UserMessage(format!(
265:                     "Rebase of `{current}` onto `{target}` failed due to conflicts — resolve manually"
266:                 )));
267:             }
268:             git::checkout(&target)?;
269:             git::fast_forward_merge(&current)?;
270:             ui::success(&format!("Rebased `{current}` into `{target}`"));
271:         }
272:         "merge" => {
273:             if !force {
274:                 ui::warn("Creating a merge commit. This will cause rebase conflicts if child branches are restacked later.");
275:                 ui::hint("Only use --strategy merge if this is a terminal branch. Use --strategy squash (default) for stacks.");
276:                 ui::hint("Use --force to suppress this warning.");
277:                 bail!(EzError::UserMessage(
278:                     "merge aborted — use --force or --strategy squash".to_string(),
279:                 ));
280:             }
281:             git::checkout(&target)?;
282:             git::merge_no_ff(&current)?;
283:             ui::success(&format!("Merged `{current}` into `{target}` (merge commit)"));
284:         }
285:         other => {
286:             bail!(EzError::UserMessage(format!("Unknown strategy: {other}")));
287:         }
288:     }
289: 
290:     // Reparent children of current branch to target
291:     let children = state.children_of(&current);
292:     let new_parent_head = git::rev_parse(&target)?;
293:     for child in &children {
294:         let child_meta = state.get_branch_mut(child)?;
295:         child_meta.parent = target.clone();
296:         child_meta.parent_head = new_parent_head.clone();
297:     }
298: 
299:     // Remove the merged branch from state and delete it
300:     state.remove_branch(&current);
301:     state.save()?;
302:     let _ = git::delete_branch(&current, true);
303: 
304:     // Handle worktree cleanup
305:     if let Ok(Some(wt_path)) = git::branch_checked_out_elsewhere(&current, &current_root) {
306:         if let Err(e) = git::worktree_remove(&wt_path) {
307:             ui::warn(&format!("Could not remove worktree: {e}"));
308:         }
309:     }
310: 
311:     if !children.is_empty() {
312:         ui::info(&format!(
313:             "Reparented {} child branch(es) to `{target}`",
314:             children.len()
315:         ));
316:         ui::hint("Run `ez restack` to update child branches");
317:     }
318: 
319:     ui::receipt(&serde_json::json!({
320:         "cmd": "merge",
321:         "action": "local",
322:         "branch": current,
323:         "into": target,
324:         "strategy": strategy,
325:         "children_reparented": children.len(),
326:     }));
327: 
328:     Ok(())
329: }
